prestazioni: Engine swap to a Pontiac 455 Super Duty (engine code: 455 SD) with forged internals including a forged crankshaft (Callies 4340 steel), forged connecting rods (Eagle H-beam), and forged pistons (JE 12.5:1 compression ratio) for 600+ HP on race gas. Pair with a custom camshaft (Comp Cams XE284HR with 248°/254° duration and 0.585" lift) and solid roller lifters for aggressive valvetrain performance.

Forced induction via a Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer) mounted on a custom T4/T6 hybrid manifold (Stainless Works) with 3" stainless steel downpipe and dual wastegates (Turbonetics 44mm). Intercooled with a custom air-to-water setup (Spearco Pro-Fit intercooler core) and methanol injection (Snow Performance Stage 3 kit) for detonation control.

Fuel and ignition system overhaul: Dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps feeding a Holley Dominator EFI system with 160 lb/hr injectors (ID1700x), controlled by a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU. Ignition upgraded to MSD 8 Plus CD box with Blaster SS coil and Taylor 8.8mm spiral-core wires. Exhaust system features 2.5" mandrel-bent stainless headers (Hooker Super Competition) with 3" Flowmaster 44 Series mufflers for optimal scavenging.
estetica: Full custom bodywork by Ringbrothers, including hand-formed steel widebody fenders (2.5" wider in front, 3" wider in rear) with integrated side-exit exhaust cutouts. Front splitter and rear diffuser fabricated from carbon fiber (AeroCatch mounting system) with functional air curtains for downforce.

Custom interior by Katzkin featuring full Alcantara upholstery (Pontiac tri-color stripe pattern) with Recaro SRD front seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) and a custom roll cage (Chassisworks 4-point bolt-in with integrated harness bar). Steering wheel replaced with a Nardi Classic 380mm wood-rim wheel on a Tilton quick-release hub.

Exterior lighting upgraded to Hella 7" headlights (H4 conversion) with Cibie Oscar projectors and LED halo rings. Rear taillights replaced with custom sequential LED units (United Pacific) in a one-piece billet aluminum housing. Paint scheme: PPG custom mix "Midnight Amethyst Pearl" with hand-painted gold leaf accents on the GTO badges and hood scoop.
